description_long: This is a modern, four-door pickup truck with a metallic deep red body and matte gray accents on the bumpers, wheel arches, and lower trim. The vehicle features a spacious cargo bed at the rear, blacked-out windows, and a prominent star emblem on the hood, suggesting a military or rugged theme. The wheels are large with intricate, multi-spoke rims and low-profile tires, giving the truck a robust and stylish appearance. The front grille is wide with multiple vertical slats, and the headlights are compact and integrated into the design. Side mirrors are mounted on both front doors, and the overall build is boxy yet streamlined. The truck's proportions and details indicate it is designed for both utility and urban appeal.
description: A modern, deep red four-door pickup truck with matte gray accents, a star emblem on the hood, and a spacious cargo bed. It features large, stylish wheels and a robust, boxy design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck, four doors, large wheels, and the star emblem on the hood.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open cargo bed, rear bumper, and the width of the vehicle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the four doors and cargo bed.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the grille, headlights, star emblem on the hood, and side mirrors.
